title: Run Results Response Schema
description: Response schema for GET /api/v1/experiment-runs/runs/{run_id}/results. The route is in the 'bare' wrap-map list (experiment_run_routes), so there is no {success,message,data} envelope. The payload is directly the results object. Configurations are paginated via configurations_pagination (a run-results-specific extension of the standard pagination shape). Over-materialization of this surface is tracked in TraigentBackend#1106.

configurations.description: Page of configuration run result objects. Shape is the BE configuration_run to_dict() serialization; see evaluation/configuration_run_schema.json for the canonical resource definition.

results.description: Top-level results object from the experiment run (may be null before completion).

metrics.description: Aggregated numeric metrics across all configuration runs (average per key). Null when no numeric measures are recorded.

start_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started

end_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run completed

configurations_pagination.description: Run-results-specific pagination metadata, present when configurations have been paginated by the route layer (_bound_run_results_payload). Extends the standard pagination shape with run-results-specific fields.

details_included.description: Whether per-configuration detail fields are included (controlled by ?detailed=true)

configurations_truncated.description: True when the returned configurations array is a subset of the total (i.e. pagination is active)

configuration_details_truncated.description: True when detail fields have been stripped from any configuration in the page (i.e. ?detailed was not set)
